programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow comes from the grounds of Salisbury Cathedral in Wiltshire, where surprises include a mysterious object linked to the Titanic, a watch with connections to early moon exploration, and an undiscovered letter written by Churchill.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Roadshow comes from the V&A Dundee, on the east coast of Scotland. Fiona Bruce uncovers the fascinating story behind the design of this landmark museum and the treasures it houses.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Lytham Hall in Lancashire finds include a rare automaton, a sketch by Lowry, a world-class watch and the medals won by Britain's first black Olympian.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: This week's Antiques Roadshow comes from the stately setting of Compton Verney in Warwickshire, where surprising finds include a charming sketch by one of the nation's favourite illustrators.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Antiques Roadshow returns to Morden Hall Park in London, where the experts unearth a Faberge vanity case, a ring by one of the most innovative goldsmiths of the 20th century and a magnifying glass linked to Pablo Picasso.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow is at Battle Abbey in East Sussex, where treasures brought along include a diamond ring that was bought for a pound, a 17th-century violin, the most valuable ever brought to the Roadshow, and a unique telegram from Hitler.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Roadshow comes from Castle Ward on the shores of Strangford Lough in Northern Ireland, where Fiona Bruce discovers that the architecture of this unusual house has something of a split personality.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce discovers what was really inside a 200 year old bottle of wine that Andy McConnell foolishly tasted in 2016 and traces the history of a chocolate treat in the shape of the nurse that dates back to the First World War.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow is at Battle Abbey, where treasures brought along include an incredibly rare Beatles guitar with an enviable history, which turns out to be one of the most valuable items ever seen on the show.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow is in the grounds of Salisbury Cathedral in Wiltshire, where experts discover an eclectic mix of treasures including Napoleon's razor, letters from Enid Blyton and a piece of Queen Victoria's underwear.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Raymond Blanc combines the universally popular ingredients of egg and cheese to make a classic omelette with a secret technique; he then uses a Comte from his home region in France to make a family-style souffle.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Blanc focuses on tomatoes, opening with a simple salad recipe inspired by his mother; he also makes a creamy risotto, stuffed tomatoes glazed with cheese and a series of ices and sorbets to cleanse the palate with elegance.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: The series starts in autumnal Bordeaux. Rick arrives just in time to judge a local wine contest, and hires a 2CV for an excursion to the coast - abundant with mussels and oysters.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein enjoys a winter break in Reykjavik in search of the perfect cod and sampling succulent fjord-reared roast lamb.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick enjoys a weekend in Berlin, where history and the avant garde dwell enticingly side by side. A city that once made history with its divisive wall teems today with an overwhelming array of innovative chefs offering delicious seasonal creations.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein visits Vienna, the city that once ran the Austro-Hungarian Empire. It is home to comfort dishes like tafelspitz and goulash, and it also gave its name to one of Europe's most popular dishes, the wiener schnitzel.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick visits Bologna in northern Italy, a city so famous for its food that it's known as the stomach of Italy. He learns how to make the local fresh egg pasta used for tortellini, tagliatelle, ravioli and lasagne.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein visits Lisbon on the banks of the River Tagus, a city in love with its seafood and possibly the best custard tarts in the world. The culinary effects of Portugal's historic explorations are still seen in its dishes.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick visits the home of New Nordic cuisine, Copenhagen, where ground-breaking chefs create artful dishes and religiously stick to seasonal Danish ingredients. Rick goes foraging for rosehip and learns about the art of pickling buds, bark and flowers.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein heads to southern Spain and the historic city of Cadiz, where the narrow winding streets captivate him as he walks in the footsteps of the ancient Phoenician and Arab traders whose influence on the city can still be seen today.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick visits the north-eastern Greek city of Thessaloniki.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends

programme.title: Sandringham: A Royal Residence
programme.desc: The death of Edward VII in 1910 rocks Sandringham and the royals; the privately-owned house was inherited by Edward VII's wife, Alexandra; how the abdication crisis threw the very future of the house into question.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Tras el caso de Éxtasis en Nueva York, el imitador pirateó el sistema informático de García, en el que publica fotografías de cada uno de los miembros del equipo en Nueva York y su tarjeta de visita “Zugzwang”.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el suicidio de un oficial de la Marina retirado, que dejó una moneda rara y valiosa en el Museo Nacional de la Marina. El equipo se imagina a sí mismo en la historia de su vida para reconstruir cómo la moneda quedó en su poder.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga la muerte de un oficial de la Marina asesinado de la misma manera que sus padres hace una década, se topan con un contenedor de almacenamiento lleno de casas de muñecas que muestran recreaciones de escenas de asesinatos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo busca respuestas cuando el cuerpo de un respetado técnico de la Marina, en las reservas es encontrado flotando en un lago donde se lleva a cabo un evento comunitario popular.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando Karen y Jimmy son tomados como rehenes en un restaurante después de que el robo de una joyería sale mal, intentan mantener a los otros clientes a salvo de los ladrones.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Después de que alguien irrumpa en la casa de Luis Delgado y mate a su esposa, Luis y Danny se unen para atrapar al malvado asesino, quien también puede ser responsable de la muerte de Linda.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Erin debe convencer a Frank de que apoye un nuevo proyecto de ley de la policía estatal como parte de un trato que hizo con el gobernador Mendez.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: La evidencia de ADN en un caso de asesinato lleva a Danny y Baez a gemelos idénticos con coartadas idénticas. Frank se entera de que Nicky está entrevistando para un trabajo en la Coalición de Justicia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando se acerca el día de la boda de Jamie y Eddie, Frank se preocupa por el brindis que va a entregar en su cena de ensayo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC viaja a Arizona a investigar una serie de crímenes metódicos ocurridos a mujeres, el final es desconcertante. Dentro del equipo también se vive incertidumbre porque Hotch puede ser el remplazo de Strauss quien murió en la temporada pasada.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC sigue en Arizona investigando acerca de la vida familiar del sospechoso, el cual tenía un gemelo idéntico, pero la madre nunca se lo dijo a la policía.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un francotirador dispara en Dallas, la BAU investiga si el próximo aniversario del asesinato de Kennedy es un factor de motivación, pero descubrirán que en realidad va a matar la mujer de quien lo contrato.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC conoce a su nuevo jefe, Mateo Cruz, un antiguo conocido de JJ. Cruz se une al equipo mientras peinan las calles de Baltimore en busca de un sospechoso que deja a las víctimas incapaces de comunicarse.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga la muerte de un oficial de la Marina asesinado de la misma manera que sus padres hace una década, se topan con un contenedor de almacenamiento lleno de casas de muñecas que muestran recreaciones de escenas de asesinatos.

programme.title: Still The King
programme.desc: Vernon goes on a 'date' with a former child actress to give her some bad girl cred. Meanwhile, Debbie takes a hungover Charlotte to work to teach her a lesson.

programme.title: Still The King
programme.desc: A TV movie is being made about Vernon's exploits and he will be portrayed by none other than Trayne Crostown! Vernon and Trayne spend the day together as Trayne researches Vernon's character.

programme.title: Still The King
programme.desc: When Vernon sees Trayne's portrayal of him in the TV movie, he and Walt set out to sabotage the production.

programme.title: Still The King
programme.desc: Vernon scores a gig at a Predators hockey match and Ronnie uses the occasion to propose to Debbie.

programme.title: Still The King
programme.desc: Vernon fills in for an absent Ronnie and spends the day helping Debbie plan for her upcoming wedding.

programme.title: Still The King
programme.desc: Much to his chagrin, Vernon discovers his manager has given his new single to another recording artist to perform.

programme.title: Still The King
programme.desc: It's Debbie and Ronnie's big wedding day! When Debbie's water breaks on the altar, Vernon races against the clock to be there for the birth

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: The top trainers in the sport of horse reining dial up the heat in Arizona as they try to qualify for this year's Run For A Million -- giving them a shot at the largest purse in the history of the sport.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: With the final qualifiers selected for this year's Run For A Million, it's back to the ranches as the McCutcheon dynasty gets back to business. After missing the qualifier, Abby Lengel must begin the process of trying to get back into the competition.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: Andrea, Matt, and Craig share the struggles and joys of the sport they love while training some of the next generation's brightest reining stars -- their children.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: The competitors test their best Run For A Million prospects at the NRBC in Katy, TX. Some riders are sliding away with big checks while others are realizing they might not have the caliber of horse they will need to take the top prize in Vegas.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: With the Run for a Million just around the corner, the top riders meet at the NHRA Derby for one final test before Vegas. The underdogs are out to prove they are a force to be reckoned with against the top contenders.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: The moment has finally arrived as the sport's best riders gather in Vegas with their eyes on the top prize. The excitement and tension are high as these riders know that one perfect ride could change their lives forever.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: Eight modern-day cowboys and cowgirls train to compete for the first-ever million-dollar prize in horse reining, one of the toughest and most dangerous sports in the world.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: As the riders prepare for the Cactus Classic, Matt struggles when his horse has health issues, and Abby feels the pressure in her first competition since going solo.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: Leading up to the Run for a Million show, Andrea undercuts Matt's search for the perfect horse, Abby deals with a flooded practice arena, and Craig seeks a much-needed payday.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: At the National Reining Breeders Classic, Jason has a chance to prove his skills equal Andrea's, and Cade has to come through in the clutch.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 04/03/2016. America’s most iconic river sustains more than 40 million people in the West. But as populations boom and the waters recede, will it continue to flow?

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 04/10/2016. Can this magical kingdom of Bhutan, the happiest place on Earth, stay blissfully content as the modern world begins to encroach on its remote borders?

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 04/17/2016. The stunning wildlife of Africa is under threat. Bill Weir goes on a safari to meet the naturalists battling to save creatures from extinction.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 12/18/2016. Bill Weir travels to Amsterdam, famed as one of the world's most liberal cities, to find out if it can stay that way amid a rising tide of intolerance.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 10/07/2017. What’s the best way to protect paradise? In stunning Patagonia, an American conservationist has purchased vast tracts of land to the fury of local developers.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 10/14/2017. As deforestation rages and unique species vanish, the fight is on to save one of the planet’s most special places before it is ruined forever.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 09/22/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Andalucia during Semana Santa, Holy Week, to visit longtime director Zach Zamboni, who currently lives in Granada.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 09/29/2013. With a combination of cultures, New Mexico has the largest Hispanic population per capita in the US. Go with Anthony Bourdain as he explores.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/06/2013. Home to chef Rene Redzepi of Noma, Copenhagen is known as the cultural center of Denmark. Anthony Bourdain explores its fantastic food and natural beauty.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/13/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Sicily, where he goes fishing for his supper and sets out to find a home-cooked meal.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 09/22/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Andalucia during Semana Santa, Holy Week, to visit longtime director Zach Zamboni, who currently lives in Granada.

programme.title: How It Really Happened
programme.desc: Aired 12/10/2017. A tale of murder, adultery, courtroom drama, and ultimately the death penalty. The story of Scott and Laci Peterson as told by those who lived it. Did Scott Peterson murder Laci?

programme.title: How It Really Happened
programme.desc: Aired 12/10/2017. A tale of murder, adultery, courtroom drama, and ultimately the death penalty. The story of Scott and Laci Peterson as told by those who lived it. Did Scott Peterson murder Laci?

programme.title: How It Really Happened
programme.desc: Aired 10/22/2017. Celebrity designer Gianni Versace was gunned down in broad daylight on the steps of his Miami Beach mansion. Those closest to Versace and his killer Andrew Cunanan, try to unravel the mystery.

programme.title: How It Really Happened
programme.desc: Aired 11/5/2017. May 2001 in Washington DC, 24 year old intern Chandra Levy vanishes into thin air. Police find her keys and her cell phone in her apartment and no sign of a struggle. Who saw her last? Where did she go?

programme.title: How It Really Happened
programme.desc: Aired 11/12/2017. An eight-month-old baby is fatally injured while in the care of his au pair (nanny), Louise Woodward. Was it child abuse or a tragic accident?

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man's mole gives him away when he tries to fool police with a fake name, a drunken man shows officers he has nothing to hide, and a reckless driver imperils a neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are left to solve the crime after signs of an apparent stabbing. A man loiters in a private park. A driver insists that the car is his - even though he needs a screwdriver to start the ignition and the plates are stolen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted suspect tries to hide from officers, a woman calls deputies to apprehend her hostile husband, and a passenger tries to outrun the police during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Three male suspects are apprehended for solicitation. Officers respond to a domestic violence call at a nearby apartment complex. An officer is alarmed when she discovers an older male is the boyfriend of a teenager.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman tells officers she’s a vampire. Officers question a colorful man dressed as a woman. A violent woman screams obscenities at officers and needs to be restrained.

programme.title: ¿Por qué nací mujer?

programme.title: Aquí Está Tu Enamorado

programme.title: Los tres bohemios

programme.title: Los tres bohemios
programme.desc: Tres jóvenes cantantes reciben ayuda de la dueña de un restaurante y estos hacen famoso al local con su música.

programme.title: El abogado del mal
programme.desc: Jamie Foxx presenta la inspiradora historia real del director de una banda de música de instituto que transformó a su variopinta banda de jazz en un legendario grupo de funk que arrasó en todo el país.

programme.title: Sin Ley
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf, Tom Hardy y Jessica Chastain protagonizan esta adaptación de la novela basada en hechos reales “El condado más húmedo del mundo”. Una banda de contrabandistas que huyen hacia el sueño norteamericano durante la “Ley Seca”.

programme.title: Paranoia
programme.desc: Kale Brecht (Shia LaBeouf) pasa los días espiando a los vecinos, mientras cumple un arresto domiciliario de tres meses. Todo es juegos y diversión hasta que las cosas dan un horroroso giro hacia lo peor.

programme.title: Tan distinto como yo
programme.desc: Del éxito de ventas del NY Times llega una historia inspiradora y verdadera sobre dos hombres de orígenes radicalmente opuestos, que desarrollan un sorprendente vínculo que los llevará al viaje más notable de sus vidas y forjará una amistad eterna.

programme.title: Vidas al límite
programme.desc: Frank es un paramédico que está al borde de la locura por tantos años de salvar y perder vidas. Una noche, Frank conoce a Mary Burke, la hija de un hombre a quien Frank intentó salvar. Juntos, Frank y Mary enfrentarán a los fantasmas del pasado.

programme.title: Salvajes
programme.desc: Cuando una familia rica le ofrece a Liz un trabajo como masajista personal, ella lo acepta. Pero la alta sociedad es una jungla, y su hijo cae en el mundo de los clubes de campo, del sexo, las drogas y los privilegios.

programme.title: Hombre caído
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf protagoniza a un veterano de guerra de la Marina de los EE. UU., quien regresa de Afganistán para encontrar un mundo completamente diferente, y busca desesperadamente a su esposa e hijo separados.

programme.title: Lars y una chica de verdad
programme.desc: Lars (Ryan Gosling), un chico dulce y ermitaño, se pierde en un cómico triángulo amoroso al encontrar a la chica de sus sueños en una muñeca llamada Bianca, a la vez que comienza a sentirse atraído por su compañera de trabajo, Margo.

programme.title: El sol tambíen es una estrella
programme.desc: Sumergirse en este romance épico sobre dos adolescentes que se conocen y se enamoran en un día fatídico en medio del fervor de la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: El sol tambíen es una estrella
programme.desc: Sumergirse en este romance épico sobre dos adolescentes que se conocen y se enamoran en un día fatídico en medio del fervor de la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: Atlas de geografia humana
programme.desc: Fran, Rosa, Ana and Marisa have jobs putting together an Atlas of Geography. Their fairly predictable lives are about to change, starting now. While working on the Atlas, they experience romance, heartbreak, infidelity, and reconciliation.

programme.title: Como asesinar a una millonaria
programme.desc: Joan Rivers interpreta a la ama de casa de Beverly Hills, Irma Summers, quien está convencida de que su esposo planea matarla.

programme.title: El sabor del amor
programme.desc: Alice, una joven y talentosa sous chef del mejor restaurante de Nueva York, recibe una invitación para ser jueza de un concurso de comida para una prestigiosa recaudación de fondos anual.

programme.title: Pequeñas grandes amigas
programme.desc: Molly es una princesa fiestera cuyo dinero acaba de agotarse. Ray es una niña quisquillosa cuya niñera acaba de salir huyendo. Cuando Molly es contratada para cuidar de Ray, se forma la combinación perfecta para que ambas chicas cambien sus vidas.

programme.title: Los tuyos, los míos, y los nuestros
programme.desc: Un almirante viudo de la Guardia costera y una viuda diseñadora de bolsos se enamoran y se casan, para la consternación de sus hijos, ocho de él y diez de ella.

programme.title: La última pelea
programme.desc: La última pelea" narra la conmovedora e inspiracional historia de la familia Conlon, Brendan (Joel Edgerton), Tommy (Tom Hardy) y Paddy (Nick Nolte), quienes encuentran redención en la arena al luchar para arreglarse a sí mismos y a su familia.

programme.title: Rambo: Primera Sangre
programme.desc: El veterano de la guerra de Vietnam, John J. Rambo, vaga a una pequeña ciudad de Washington en busca de su viejo amigo, pero se encuentra con la intolerancia y brutalidad del aguacil, Will Teasle.

programme.title: Rambo II: la misión
programme.desc: John Rambo is enviado a una misión al sureste de Asia para rastrear a unos prisioneros de guerra, pero termina enfrentando a soldados vietnamitas que resguardan los campos.

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: Rambo se rehúsa a unirse a su amigo y antiguo mentor, el coronel Trautman en una misión en Afganistán. La misión falla y Trautman es capturado por tropas rusas. Ahora Rambo debe infiltrarse a la fortaleza rusa y salvar a su único amigo.

programme.title: Highlander: El juego final
programme.desc: Dos mundos se unen cuando la estrella de cine de HIGHLANDER Christopher Lambert forma equipo con la estrella de la serie de televisión HIGHLANDER Adrian Paul para combatir a un temible villano y su despiadada banda de inmortales.

programme.title: La máquina asesina
programme.desc: Un asesino entrenado en la Unión Soviética está decidido a escapar de su doble vida de asesino a sueldo y padre.

programme.title: Pisando furete
programme.desc: Cuando se trata de imponer la ley, un solo hombre puede marcar la diferencia. Dwayne 'la Roca' Johnson no tiene piedad al hacer imperar la justicia y aplastar la corrupción en esta historia de un hombre que decide actuar para recuperar su ciudad.

programme.title: El infierno
programme.desc: Benny ha sido deportado de los Estados Unidos a México, que está siendo destrozado por las guerras de los carteles de droga. Luego se involucra en el negocio del narcotráfico y comienza a subir de rango.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: No eres tú, soy yo
programme.desc: Después de la ruptura de su reciente matrimonio, Javier se encuentra en una depresión de la que ni siquiera un psiquiatra puede ayudarlo a salir. Sin embargo, la esperanza está en camino en la forma improbable de sus exnovias.

programme.title: Instructions Not Included
programme.desc: Valentin (Eugenio Derbez) is Acapulco’s resident playboy until his life gets turned upside down when a former fling leaves a baby girl on his doorstep.

programme.title: Escobar: La herencia maldita
programme.desc: Cómo Pablo Escobar fue derrocado por las autoridades, y qué legado había significado su muerte para su heredero, Juan Pablo Escobar.

programme.title: Después de Lucía.
programme.desc: Tras la muerte de su esposa, Roberto se muda a la Ciudad de México con su hija, Alejandra. Ella se vuelve objeto de acoso cuando surge un video en el cual Alejandra tiene relaciones con un compañero.

programme.title: Odio el amor
programme.desc: A teenager loses his hearing after a terrible accident. Shortly after, he falls in love with a foreign girl living in Mexico. He then finds out that being in love makes him hear again.

programme.title: Los domésticos
programme.desc: Un matrimonio busca refugio en un mundo apocalíptico controlado por malvadas pandillas. Una de estas depravadas pandillas pone a la pareja en la mira, por lo que ellos harán lo que sea para sobrevivir.

programme.title: Extrañas apariciones
programme.desc: Después de que una familia se ve obligada a mudarse por la salud de su hijo, comienzan a experimentar un comportamiento sobrenatural en su nuevo hogar, que resulta ser una antigua funeraria.

programme.title: Fantasmas
programme.desc: 150 muertos y 350 desaparecidos en la pequeña ciudad montañosa de Snowfield, Colorado. Y ese es tan solo el comienzo...

programme.title: The Ninth Gate (LAS)
programme.desc: Roman Polanski dirige y Johnny Depp protagoniza este thriller sobrenatural sobre un vendedor de libros raros que descubre un manuscrito demoníaco.

programme.title: Los niños del maíz 666: el retorno de Isaac
programme.desc: Hace 19 años, un niño lideraba un culto de niños para que asesinen y cumplan una profecía. Ahora, Isaac regresó, y regresaron los rituales extraños en la sexta película de una de las franquicias de películas de terror más populares de la historia.

programme.title: Los niños del maíz V: campos del terror
programme.desc: Seis estudiantes de la universidad se equivocan de camino y se pierden en una ciudad rural abandonada, liderada por un culto de niños asesinos controlados por una fuerza maligna, en la quinta película de la popular franquicia de películas de terror.

programme.title: Wishmaster: el genio del mal
programme.desc: Cuando un apreciador de joyas recibe una gema antigua, sin saberlo, desata un espíritu inmortal que concede deseos a los humanos a cambio de sus almas.

programme.title: Euroviaje
programme.desc: Europa nunca será la misma después de que Scotty Thomas y sus amigos aterrizan para vivir aventuras y excesos, haciendo las cosas más alocadas en el viaje más salvaje de sus vidas!

programme.title: Querido Dios
programme.desc: Greg Kinnear protagoniza en este espíritu-levantador sobre un estafador que va de nada bueno al hacer el bien.

programme.title: Happy, Texas

programme.title: El ascenso

programme.title: La Seducción
programme.desc: El hilarante Steve Martin protagoniza esta historia oscura y cómica de un buen hombre en una mala situación. Con Helena Bonham Carter, Laura Dern y Scott Caan.

programme.title: Artículo 99: lucha por la vida
programme.desc: Kiefer Sutherland y Ray Liotta protagonizan este impactante drama en el que interpretan a unos médicos que luchan contra la burocracia, sacando a la luz la actividad de hospitales públicos para veteranos de guerra rompiendo reglas para salvar vidas.

programme.title: War Of The Wildcats
programme.desc: A confident oil baron and a determined cowboy are rivals for Oklahoma land and oil rights, and for the love of a pretty schoolteacher. The cowboy acts on behalf of the Indians, on whose land the oil is discovered.

programme.title: Big Jake
programme.desc: An aging Texas cattle man who has outlived his time swings into action when outlaws kidnap his grandson and wound his son.

programme.title: Red River
programme.desc: John Wayne, Montgomery Clift and Walter Brennan give stellar performances in Howard Hawks' epic masterpiece as a self-made cattle baron (Wayne) and his adopted son (Clift) risk everything to drive their herd across the treacherous Chisholm Trail.

programme.title: Vera Cruz
programme.desc: In this epic Western, two shady mercenaries (Gary Cooper, Burt Lancaster) in Mexico during the 1866 revolution are hired to escort a Countess and her gold to the Mexican army in Vera Cruz and find themselves at odds with the army…and each other!

programme.title: War Of The Wildcats
programme.desc: A confident oil baron and a determined cowboy are rivals for Oklahoma land and oil rights, and for the love of a pretty schoolteacher. The cowboy acts on behalf of the Indians, on whose land the oil is discovered.

programme.title: Support Your Local Sheriff!
programme.desc: James Garner stars in this rollicking western spoof that has him taking on the job of a frontier town sheriff who must fend off villains (led by Walter Brennen) from every direction...all without breaking a sweat or dirtying his shiny black boots!

programme.title: Support Your Local Gunfighter
programme.desc: James Garner is back in the saddle again as hustler Latigo Smith whose latest con is passing off cowhand Jug (Jack Elam) as the dreaded gunman Swifty Morgan. But when the real Swifty shows up, the Wild West is going to get a whole lot wackier!

programme.title: True Grit (1969)
programme.desc: The cantankerous Rooster is hired by a headstrong young girl (Kim Darby) to find the man who murdered her father and fled with the family savings.

programme.title: Doc
programme.desc: Stacy Keach, Haris Yulin, and Faye Dunaway give riveting performances in this controversial and myth-shattering reexamination of the darker side of gunslinger Doc Holliday and the actions that led to the infamous showdown in Tombstone, Arizona.

programme.title: True Grit (1969)
programme.desc: The cantankerous Rooster is hired by a headstrong young girl (Kim Darby) to find the man who murdered her father and fled with the family savings.

programme.title: The Night of the Hunter
programme.desc: Robert Mitchum stars in an unforgettable role as a psychopathic preacher in the relentless pursuit of two children who have their dead father's stolen fortune hidden in a doll. Shelley Winters co-stars.

programme.title: The Defiant Ones
programme.desc: In Stanley Kramer's cinema classic, screen legends Sidney Poitier and Tony Curtis star as two convicts on the run from a Southern work gang who are bound together by an unbreakable iron chain and separated by an unbridled hatred for each other.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer starts dating Sergeant Carter's sister. Carter is determined to break them up.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver refuses to take Lisa to New York City to attend the wedding anniversary of an old friend. Meanwhile, Eb, always up to something, has a new invisible friend named Charlie. To get her way, Lisa introduces her own invisible friend... Natasha.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa gives the financially-challenged Eb her engagement ring to present to Darlene, his longtime sweetheart, so that he can pop the question. The ring is reportedly valued at $2,000, however, when Darlene's father has it appraised, it's a shocker.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The Douglases are offered a free paint job on their house and barn so long as they allow the paint company free advertising on their barn wall. Meanwhile, Lisa tries to make spaghetti for Oliver's upcoming birthday. Will it prove im-pasta-ble?

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: While staying with the Douglases, Arnold the Pig witnesses a bank robbery when he goes with the Douglases on an errand in Pixley. When Lisa asks him to describe the two robbers, Arnold, reliving the moment, loses his voice from fear.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver refuses to take Lisa to the annual Carpenter's Ball because he thinks the attendees are too eccentric for his liking. But Lisa has her own motives to attend. She is trying to get a romance sparked between two local singles.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Aloha! The Douglases vacation in Hawaii. But the daughter of the hotel manager needs to keep secret that she double booked the honeymoon suite. The 'sweet' surprise? While Lisa and Oliver settle in, they are unaware that the other room is occupied.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver's heirloom watch is broken so he tries to find his ex-secretary Carol's address to ask her the name of the jeweler who fixed it last time. Carol is now working and living in Los Angeles, and we get a glimpse into her new life.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When Oliver decides to attend night school and enrolls in a farming class, Lisa does the same, taking psychology. Before long, many of the residents of Hooterville are lining up for appointments with the eminent Dr. Lisa.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: In this classic series' premiere episode, New York City attorney Oliver Wendell Douglas (Eddie Albert) satisfies his desire for the simple life by buying a farm, much to the chagrin of his wife, Lisa (Eva Gabor). John Charles Daly narrates the tale!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) brings his wife, Lisa (Eva Gabor), to their new home, a ramshackle farm near Hooterville, just outside of Pixley, where she gets to meet the town's oddball residents. Bea Benaderet, Edgar Buchanan and Frank Cady guest star!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) is ready to get farming, but Lisa (Eva Gabor) puts her foot down and says she will leave unless they can hire a decorator to fix the house! Meanwhile, Kate Bradley (Bea Benaderet) teaches Lisa how to make hotcakes.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Is the Honeymoon period over already? The rumor mill has it that Lisa (Eva Gabor) has packed up and left Oliver (Eddie Albert). Actually, she went back to New York to close up their penthouse apartment. And Mr. Haney is up to his old tricks!

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie gets a rude shock when the tall,classy dame whose life he saved in a taxicab turns out to be a man.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: The day has come that Mike and Gloria are moving into their new home and Archie is practically pushing them out the door. Archie is being so obnoxious that Mike finally reaches a boiling point until he declares his independence and calls Archie a fathead.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie will do anything to get a promotion at the loading dock. So, he agrees to help Mr. Sanders with his latest charity, unaware that it involves something that goes against his morals - organ donation.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: While driving Munson's cab, Archie saves the life of a beautiful woman who becomes unconscious. Uh, was that a woman? Sorry, that was no woman, thanks to female impersonator Beverly LaSalle's convincing act.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude's grandson Phillip is devastated when he finally finds out the real reason why an 'older woman' has been dating him.

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude

programme.desc: En 1993, Kathryn Bishop de 82 años es encontrada muerta en su hogar de Pennsylvania. Pequeñas pistas en el cuerpo de la víctima le dirán a la policía lo que pasó esa noche.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los investigadores examinan las cenizas de un incendio que mató a una mujer de 40 años. El fuego parecía haber sido iniciado por un cigarrillo desatendido.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Vestido para Matar
programme.desc: Se sospecha del padre de una niña cuando ella es asesinada, pero años después la policía se entera que un asesino condenado vivía cerca. Pequeñas gotas de sangre ayudan a la policía a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encuentra a una mujer muerta en el piso del cuarto de su apartamento.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Fue uno de los crímenes más descarados del siglo 20. Adolph Coors III, el ejecutivo de Coors Brewing Company, fue secuestrado y retenido para un rescate.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Asesino cereal
programme.desc: Cuando un incendio destruyó la mayor parte de una casa y un niño desapareció, la policía organizó la búsqueda más grande en la historia de su pequeña ciudad.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los testigos vieron a una mujer en la parte trasera de un camión, agitando los brazos y gritando. Cuando encontraron una chaqueta cerca de un charco de sangre, supieron que lo que habían visto no había sido un paseo divertido.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Atormentada por la desaparición de su madre, una joven emprendió su propia investigación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer desaparecía sin dejar rastro, había dos posibles explicaciones: secuestro o asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de Leanne Tiernan, de 16 años, fue descubierto nueve meses después de su desaparición. Los científicos forenses encontraron pistas que pintaron un retrato virtual de su asesino.

programme.desc: Juan Manuel Marquez takes on Floyd Mayweather Jr. in a welterweight bout. From Sept. 19, 2009 in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy slyly make the final squad announcement, and the new team faces several obstacles before taking the field for their first game as Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds will audition but only 45 girls will secure a spot in the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders training camp. DCC director Kelli Finglass presides over the process with a keen eye for talent and beauty.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training camp gets underway as the girls are introduced to a grueling schedule of dance rehearsals with choreographer Judy Trammell and fitness instructor Jay Johnson.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Reality sets in and the mental and physical stress of training camp hits the girls hard.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Super Bowl XXX MVP Larry Brown and current Dallas Cowboy Ryan Fowler school the training camp candidates with the ultimate football challenge. The girls are tested on their NFL knowledge and athletic skills on the field.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Beauty is the name of the game as the training camp candidates get major hair makeovers in preparation for their first solo publicity stills. But not everyone is picture perfect and by the end of the week, there will be a heartbreaking elimination.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The end of training camp is just around the corner and after Kelli's annual etiquette luncheon the girls are on their best behavior. A tough new choreographer introduces the girls to real dance technique with devastating results.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates find themselves in front of the camera for a crash course in how to deal with the media. The judges from the open call are brought back to have their final say.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The summer is coming to a close, and there are now 36 girls poised to become America's sweethearts. Kelli and Judy are concerned the team is not ready and there may have to be more cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of excited and anxious Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders hopefuls arrive at Texas Stadium for the preliminary auditions. After performing their freestyle dance routines for the judges, only half make it to the semi-finals.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In the final audition, the competition really heats up. Now, surviving candidates must go head-to-head against experienced veteran cheerleaders for a coveted spot in the DCC Training Camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Making it this far is one thing - enduring Training Camp is another. The hopeful group of 43 is far from the final squad, and DCC Director Kelli Finglass quickly reminds them that there will be cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Only two weeks into training camp, it's time to start making cuts. While "veteran" cheerleaders model bikinis for their upcoming calendar shoot, anxious training camp "rookies" dance their hearts out to prove to Kelli and Judy that they deserve to stay.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: After saying goodbye to one of their own, reality sets in for the remaining training camp candidates: nobody's position on the squad is secure. The girls are fitted for the revealing DCC uniforms, then sweat their way through a punishing physical workout

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The training camp candidates don't know what hit them when tough as nails and brutally honest guest choreographer Kitty Carter teaches a class. Then, the rookies get one step closer to transforming into Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The rookies get to wear the iconic Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders uniform for the very first time during a professional modeling shoot. Then the girls have a life-changing experience skydiving with the legendary Army parachute team, the Golden Knights!

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: DCC training camp comes down to the last grueling rehearsals and whose long legs fit into the famous kick-line. The cheerleaders attend a bikini boot-camp for last-minute toning. Then, amid tears of disappointment and shock, Kelli makes the final cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Over 600 excited and anxious Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders hopefuls arrive at Texas Stadium for the preliminary auditions.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In the finals audition, the competition really heats up. Now, surviving candidates must go head-to-head against experienced veteran cheerleaders for a coveted spot in the DCC Training Camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training Camp begins! The newly elected training camp candidates are excited, even star-struck, as they meet the veterans for the first time at Valley Ranch.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The group competes in a grueling army fitness test to try and earn the privilege of being on the elite "Power Squad." At that evening's rehearsal, the first cuts will be made.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A young art student from Texas is found murdered in her bed with no sign of forced entry, indicating that she knew her killer.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: As a murder victim's sisters dedicate themselves to finding the killer, an unexpected source turns the case upside down.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The survivor of a horrible attack is convinced police have the wrong suspect.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: An advocate for missing and murdered Indigenous women searches for answers in the disappearance of her niece and exposes cracks in law enforcement.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Investigators try to determine what caused a house fire that killed the 41-year-old wife of a paramedic.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a young woman finds out that her boyfriend might have shot and killed a college football player out of revenge, she struggles with coming forward to officials, fearing she could lose her life.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Anton Black dies while being taken into police custody, the community seeks justice; a yearlong "Dateline" investigation looks at the officer at the center of the case and missed warning signs.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The investigation into the disappearance of a mother of three in Colorado reveals she was living a double life.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A college student is found murdered in a residential neighborhood; as police search for the truth, they are stunned to learn that one of their own might be involved.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A foreign exchange student and soccer player's participation in a dangerous game leads to deadly consequences.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Former DEA agent Andrew Hogan details his search for Mexican drug lord Joaquín "El Chapo" Guzmán with never-before-seen videos and photographs.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Police doubt an Ohio doctor's story about events leading to his wife's death.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: What Happens in Flavor Stays in Flavor
programme.desc: Flavor Flav is a good luck person. So he needs a good luck woman. To test the girls on this trait, he flies the seven remaining women to Vegas on his private jet.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: InterroGitted
programme.desc: There's six girls left so Flav brings out the big guns. He flies Brigitte Neilsen into town to get to know the girls a little better.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Roadies
programme.desc: Bret Michaels has a concert tonight. Ten girls compete to see who can clear the band's equipment off the stage the fastest.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Eight Is Not Enough
programme.desc: The eight remaining girls get a distressing “wake-up call” when Bret brings in three new girls to join the tour because he's not feeling the emotional effort.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Mudbowl III
programme.desc: It's Pink Bus vs. Blue Bus in the muddiest of Mudbowls yet! Bret flies away with the MVP for an intimate overnight trip.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Truck Stop Games
programme.desc: In a wacky competition based on beer, babes and truckers, one team will try anything to sway the judges.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Bikini Day Care
programme.desc: The tour hits Panama City Beach, Florida. Seven girls show their mothering skills by taking care of a gaggle of rowdy youngsters at the pool.

programme.title: Studs
programme.desc: The Grand Slam breakfast wins a heart.

programme.title: Studs
programme.desc: What works for some doesn't work for all.

programme.title: Studs
programme.desc: Two men date three women and then tell all.

programme.title: Studs
programme.desc: These women have very different opinions.

programme.title: Wife Swap UK
programme.desc: Two families, both whom have never met, have agreed that the Wives will swap homes, children and husbands for two weeks to see what they can learn from their own lives.

programme.desc: Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they will put up with when finding love. A dater must choose between women whose baggage includes taking her own silverware to restaurants and being afraid of the sun.

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they can put up with for love. A dater chooses between men whose baggage includes wearing sunglasses at night and needing to have his mother approve his dates.

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they can put up with for love. A dater must choose between men whose baggage includes sharing a credit card with an ex and always using coupons on dates.

programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Long Island's Laura Siano has big plans for big money--the three S's: save, spend and share. But this game also comes with M's: martinis and male models.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Flight attendant Max Reynolds is used to high-flying adventures, and this father of three is buckled up and ready to blast off against The Banker.

programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The year end semi-formal is only hours away and Marco has transformed the gym into an idealized Bombay. It promises to be an amazing event, except Marco’s theme is causing tension between him and Ellie. Ellie finds the whole idea racist

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s the end of summer and Paige receives some unexpected news - her rape case has finally made it to trial and she’s the star witness. Finally…justice!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Shocked by the outcome of the trial, Paige holes up in her room. But when Marco is able to coax her out to party at Dylan’s dorm with the gang, things go from bad to worse when she and Spinner have a blow-out fight.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s a shoo-in for Student Council President until Alex enters the race. While at first Alex seems an unlikely candidate, her strong opinions and anti-establishment platform take hold with the students and Marco realizes she might well win.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Feeling ignored on Student Council, Emma finds a way to get her voice heard when she takes up a new cause - ganging up with the cool kids to keep Terri’s abusive ex-boyfriend Rick, out of Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are going great for Sean and Ellie, Degrassi’s most unlikely couple—so well that Sean asks Ellie to move in. Despite their closeness, Ellie hesitates and Sean doesn’t understand why.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In her quest to repay Spinner for damage to his car, Alpha Paige has gone all beta. Suddenly, Spin’s using his new-found powers to zap whatever self-confidence Paige has left.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick returns to Degrassi after the “Whack Your Brain” debacle at the hands of Spinner, Jay, and Alex. Toby and Mr. Raditch try to convince him to take the afternoon off, to go home and cool off, but an oddly calm Rick chooses to stay.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After the shooting at Degrassi, the full school board counseling response team moves in. And so does the media. Local reporter, Rachel Roberts, has decided to make Sean the hero of her piece.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig has a problem – the recording deal he and his band won last year is about to expire, but “Downtown Sasquatch” is nowhere near ready to record. With Jimmy in the hospital, they’re missing a key member.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s back with Ashley and he’s determined not to screw it up this time.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Distraught when Ashley refuses his proposal, Craig falls into a major rage, completely trashing his hotel room.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Degrassi has a new hottie in Grade 9 and Manny’s got her eye on him. Especially since her “boyfriend” Spinner can’t even be bothered to take a night off work to come to the Cupid Dance she’s organized.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Something’s wrong with Emma. Though she’s frustrated at being treated with kid gloves by everyone since the school shooting, she’s not sure how she’d rather be treated. So she just keeps going on, numbly reassuring everyone that she’s fine.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma steps into the lead role in Dracula, but her recent extra-curricular activities with Jay prove even more dramatic.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner has difficulty dealing with the return of injured Jimmy. He hasn’t talked to him since the shooting, and his guilt over what he did leaves him unable to welcome Jimmy back to school.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie is finding it hard to make ends meet now that she’s living on her own and hates relying on her mother for rent, especially with its obligatory dinners to pick up the cheque.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige and Matt are totally in love, so what if they have to keep it secret? It’s worth all the extra effort.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With school coming to a close, Marco is making huge plans for his summer with Dylan – and their future. He’s considering fast-tracking to graduate high school, joining Dylan in university a year earlier.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After dutifully picking up the Spirit Squad slack for a love-struck Paige all year, Manny feels betrayed when Paige claims all the glory. So Manny plots her revenge with a complicated cheer that leaves Paige with a broken leg on Prom Night.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley’s leaving for the summer, and the idea of their temporary farewell and the stress of writing a song for Kevin Smith’s movie -- is making him, well, nuts. So Craig decides to do whatever it takes to follow her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Frustrated by everything around him, Craig runs away. As he wanders the street, he befriends a young busker nicknamed, “Skinny”.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As Paige and Spinner awkwardly discuss last night's surprising kiss-fest, Darcy interrupts. She regrets their fight and breakup. But Spinner tells her he meant what he said – if Darcy can’t accept him, past and all, they're through.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Another year at Degrassi kicks off and Manny decides she’s going to be a serious actress, whatever it takes.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s still foggy on what exactly it was that happened at Peter’s party the night before. She knows she made a pretty racy video but Peter will erase everything… or so he says.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige has got her whole life mapped out. She plans on being accepted into the marketing program at the best university in Canada.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.desc: Leopards are more resistant to extinction because of their elusive behavior. Leopards are solitary creatures, the quintessential ambush-and-stalking predator, able to find the most remote places on earth to avoid human contact.

programme.title: Wildest Europe
programme.desc: While the majority of the Europe experiences a mild climate throughout the year, certain northern regions are faced with extremes. Winter temperatures often drop to minus 40 degrees Celsius pushing life to its absolute limits.

programme.title: Finding Little Italy
programme.desc: Lazio is more than just Rome. It is an ancient land of Etruscans and Romans, of burst open volcanoes and forgotten coliseums; Lazio is an enormous and complex region that comprises medieval castles, pretty villages and shimmering lakes.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Anchorage has a rather unique resident who is renowned as nature's lumberjack and North America's largest rodent, the beaver. With their powerful teeth, the trees they fell can be huge, and their dams can be seen from space.

programme.title: Wildest Indochina
programme.desc: Cambodia is one of the most bio diverse countries in southeast Asia, whose wildlife and climate is ruled by the monsoon cycle. It is a wild land of extreme rains, raging rivers and flooding lakes that create great challenges for its animals.

programme.title: Search for the Great Sharks

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Modesto, California teenager goes missing. With no signs of struggle in her home, police suspect she has simply run away — until her naked, bruised body is discovered in a ditch 20 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Two men are murdered while sleeping in their beds. The next night, arson destroys a family planning clinic. Investigators wonder whether some shards of glass, paint chips and a chicken feather could link what appear to be two separate crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A brilliant young architect falls ill and dies just before she is to testify in a criminal trial. The autopsy reveals she'd been poisoned with arsenic. Investigators must determine who had a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses may hold the key to the death of a motorcycle gang member.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A murder trail turned cold, until police got a call from a woman whose husband, Gerald Powers, had a criminal past and a fondness for Chevy Berettas.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial killer was on the loose and police had to find him before he struck again. Their most promising lead was an unusual one: a bloody fingerprint on the body of one of the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A murder investigation in Florida crosses jurisdictions from New York and Jamaica. The police rely on cell phone mapping, wiretapping and a host of forensic evidence to link a suspect to a murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Scott Dunn goes missing, police spray his bedroom with Luminol and uncover a scene of horrific violence. Now investigators face a daunting task: proving that Scott Dunn had been murdered without a body, a witness or a murder weapon.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Digital enhancement of security camera footage shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction. When investigators suspect the crimes are not random, they fear a serial killer may be on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, a 12-year-old was found murdered in her Minnesota home. Despite a meticulous search of the home and an exhaustive investigation, police had no suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1981, 6-year-old Cassie Hansen disappeared from her Minnesota church during an evening service. After receiving a tip that an older man was seen carrying a small person, police found Cassie's body in a dumpster.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Rachael Mullenix, 19, was convicted of stabbing her mother, Barbara Mullenix, in 2006. She allegedly packed her mother's bloodied corpse in a cardboard box before dumping it in California's Newport Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are dispatched to the scene of a shooting and discover the victim's husband is one of their own: a homicide detective who says his wife accidentally shot herself in the head.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A behavioral profile caused the Baton Rouge Police Department to search for the wrong man. The real perpetrator may have eluded arrest, had it not been for a molecular biologist who painted DNA picture of the suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, 4-year-old April Loveless was found dead in the backyard of her Texas home. Her parents told police that she was attacked and killed by wild dogs. Investigators did not agree.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While vacationing in California, Earl Morris learns that his wife has gone missing from their Arizona home. The search for Ruby Morris involves dozens of investigators and scientists — and even the Coast Guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1988, the body of a young woman was discovered in an Ohio river. Most of the evidence had been washed away, but the victim's 6-year-old son unwittingly told investigators all they needed to know — without saying a word. The clue was in his genes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2001, Ginger Hayes and her infant son were abducted during a carjacking. The crime had been reported by a witness within minutes of occurrence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1994, a human skull retrieved from an Ohio pond reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate that the victim had been stabbed multiple times and that the teeth had been removed with needle-nose pliers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of a young woman was found a mile from her abandoned car. Police were especially concerned when they realized the victim had come to them for protection just two weeks earlier after a road rage incident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: No one in a quiet residential community saw anything unusual the day one of their neighbors was brutally attacked and murdered. Fingerprints found at the crime scene and surveillance video helped investigators to apprehend the presumed killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For seven years, a trio of men robbed one bank after another. They always got away before the police arrived and they left no evidence behind. But the way they stood and the clothes they wore told a story that could be read by forensic scientists.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Between 1985 and 1988, 18 people were choked, molested and left for dead in the remote mountains of California. The only witnesses were the insects — and they play an important role in solving the crimes and bringing the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the search for the killer of two Texas teenagers, a behavioral profile led to suspect Jason Massey. Hard science proved the profile was correct, and Massey was executed by lethal injection on April 3, 2001.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Maine resident Pearl Smith goes missing after an argument with her husband, Bill Bruns. When investigators find a blood trail that leads to the couple's basement, police are sure they'll find the victim's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two women from the same town were murdered in the same way, police feared a serial killer was on the loose. At first they thought the victims had nothing in common until they found tiny clues linking them to the same man.

programme.desc: When Lucy screws up a dinner appointment with Ricky's new boss, Mr. Littlefield, and his wife because she is late, Ricky puts her on a strict time schedule. Later Ricky meets with Littlefield to discuss his possible promotion to manager of the club.

programme.desc: Ricky begins wearing a hat around the apartment because he thinks he's going bald. Lucy thinks he's worrying needlessly but goes to a store that specializes in hair restoration in order to help Ricky feel better.

programme.desc: Upset at Lucy's irresponsible spending, Ricky suggests she could change her ways if she had a job. Lucy and Ethel propose switching roles with their husbands for a week; they will get jobs if the men stay home to do all the housework.

programme.desc: Ricky and his band are going on a tour and Lucy wants to go too. She dusts off her old saxophone and goes down to the club dressed in a zoot suit to audition for a spot.

programme.desc: After seeing Fred use a pair of trick handcuffs, Lucy uses a similar pair to attach herself to Ricky as gag. She wants him to stay at home and not go to a rehearsal for a live TV show the next day.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 5 of 5. Destro returns to Cobra Mountain with Scarlett as his prisoner. As he takes control of the operation from Cobra Commander, the stakes are raised for the Joe team to stop them once and for all with an all-out assault on Cobra Mountain!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 1 of 5. Cobra attacks a G.I. Joe convoy and steals a high-powered experimental laser to complete their latest weapon... the weather dominator. When the Joes launch an air assault, Destro uses the device, and it's stormy skies ahead for the Joe team.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 2 of 5. The Joe team uses an energy mirror array to counter Cobra's Weather Dominator attack on Washington, D.C. When their defense is successful, the Weather Dominator explodes in orbit, scattering its vital components across the globe.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 3 of 5. The Joe team is preparing to trek across the globe to the Island of no return to retrieve one of the three fragments of the weather dominator before Destro and Cobra can get their hands on it.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 4 of 5. As the Island of no return battle rages on, Spirit goes one-on-one with Storm Shadow for the second weather dominator fragment. Meanwhile, in the freezing arctic battleground, both sides fight for the final fragment of the weather dominator.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 5 of 5. As the weather dominator device is reassembled at Cobra's Temple, it's up to the Jor team's full-scale assault on the base to prevent the world from falling into Cobra's grasp!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra seizes control of the G.I. Joe space shuttle, using the shuttle and a series of relay cubes to create a pyramid-like “zone” no vehicle or machine can function in.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Shipwreck and Snake Eyes continue to evade capture in an effort to get back to the Joe team with vital data about Cobra's control cubes.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: As three of Cobra's relay cubes are activated, Cobra commander moves forward with his plans to activate the fourth and final cube in the sea of lost souls. Meanwhile, Shipwreck and Snake Eyes escape Cobra's troopers in Enterprise City.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra commander activates the pyramid of darkness, stranding not only the JOES but also his comrades the crimson twins. Always prepared with a backup plan, Tomax and Xamot have other designs for the pyramid and Cobra.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Chaos ensues as the leaders of Cobra struggle for control of the pyramid of darkness. As Cobra forces battle each other, the Joe team is able to regain control of space station delta and launch a full-scale assault to try to destroy the Pyramid.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Zartan, disguised as a notable French scientist, infiltrates the worldwide defense center on a mission to destroy the facility for Cobra. He's planted a bomb, and now the clock is ticking… can the Joe team find and defuse the bomb before it's too late?

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra uses Tomax and Xamot's company extensive enterprises to purchase the Red Rocket food chain and use its location as a network of secret missile launching bases. But the JOE team catches on to the conspiracy.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: When a secret military satellite is forced out of orbit by Cobra, the Joe team races to its location before Cobra can get their hands on it. But both the Joes and Cobra find that a third party has entered the battle for the device.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: In a diabolical plan to control the world's fuel supplies, Cobra begins detonating oil tankers and pipelines by remote. But when sparks uncovers the frequency Cobra is using to destroy the tankers, the Joe team may be able to turn the tables on them!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra plots to attack the cities of the world with lava flow when they kidnap Dr. Shakur and bring him to their jungle base, planning to use his breakthrough technology to harness the energy of Earth's core and cause volcanic eruptions.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra schemes to use the animals of the world against humanity with a mind-control signal enabling them to make any animal do their bidding, and the device causes Junkyard to turn on the Joes. Can they defeat Cobra and get Junkyard back to normal?

programme.desc: Arin continues his investigation into the missing Horns but makes time for Frak, who Sora suspects is working for Ras and Nya's first match pits her against Jay, still with no memory of their past.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: United We Fall
programme.desc: In her match against Cinder, Wyldfyre's temper proves a liability in and out of the arena, and in order to stay in the Tournament, the Ninja invoke an ancient rule that requires them to compete in a race outside of Temple City.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Truth and Lies
programme.desc: Arin grapples with Ras's accusation that Master Wu caused the Merge while the Ninja complete the Temple Race and win their way back into the Tournament.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Sword Shatters
programme.desc: Arin follows a lead in his investigation of the missing horns to the Temple City Museum; a tour from Roby reveals a deeper connection between the Tournament and Source Dragons.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Clues and Suspects
programme.desc: Roby and Bleckt visit an injured Lloyd to complete the transfer of Zeatrix's powers as Arin links Bleckt to a clue in his investigation and follows him back to a secret office, where Wyldfyre has an idea to uncover his plans.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Final Game
programme.desc: Arin learns a devastating secret about the Merge and confronts Lloyd as Cole stays behind to protect the dragon horns. Sora faces off against Nokt, and Wyldfyre is too late to stop the manipulation of the games.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Elements of Betrayal
programme.desc: Arin, Zane, and Cole make a shocking discovery in the Monastery of Gates as they defend the Dragon Horns; the depowered Elemental Masters clash with the Wolf Mask army.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The four Ninja are snapped out of their post-hero complacency when Lord Garmadon’s son Lloyd shows up and tries to pick up where his father left off. The Ninja dismiss him as a threat, but regret that choice after Lloyd wakes up the evil snake tribe.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Shape of Motion
programme.desc: While searching for his parents, Arin and the Ninja rescue a baby dragon, uncovering a new mystery and mission for the team.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Enter the City of Temples
programme.desc: When the Ninja are not invited to the Tournament of Sources, they break into the City of Temples to earn their entry.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: They Gather for the Feast
programme.desc: After earning invitations to the Tournament of Sources, the Ninja attend a banquet for Elemental Masters with friendly faces and old enemies, and Lloyd confronts a familiar face from his vision.
